verses.text: He saw a book sealed with seven seals, and none in heaven or earth could open it; John 'wept much.' Sealed mystery. No creature was found worthy to open God's book.
He saw a book sealed with seven seals, and none in heaven or earth could open it; John 'wept much.' Sealed mystery. No creature was found worthy to open God's book.
He saw a book sealed with seven seals, and none in heaven or earth could open it; John 'wept much.' Sealed mystery. No creature was found worthy to open God's book.
He saw a book sealed with seven seals, and none in heaven or earth could open it; John 'wept much.' Sealed mystery. No creature was found worthy to open God's book.
An elder said, 'the Lion of the tribe of Juda... hath prevailed'; and lo, 'a Lamb as it had been slain' took the book. Lion and Lamb. The slain Lamb conquers and is worthy to open.
An elder said, 'the Lion of the tribe of Juda... hath prevailed'; and lo, 'a Lamb as it had been slain' took the book. Lion and Lamb. The slain Lamb conquers and is worthy to open.
An elder said, 'the Lion of the tribe of Juda... hath prevailed'; and lo, 'a Lamb as it had been slain' took the book. Lion and Lamb. The slain Lamb conquers and is worthy to open.
The living creatures and elders fell, singing, 'Thou art worthy... for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to God by thy blood.' New song. The Lamb is praised for redeeming by blood.
The living creatures and elders fell, singing, 'Thou art worthy... for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to God by thy blood.' New song. The Lamb is praised for redeeming by blood.
The living creatures and elders fell, singing, 'Thou art worthy... for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to God by thy blood.' New song. The Lamb is praised for redeeming by blood.
Ten thousand times ten thousand angels cry, 'Worthy is the Lamb that was slain to receive power.' Angel host. Heaven's millions exalt the Lamb.
Ten thousand times ten thousand angels cry, 'Worthy is the Lamb that was slain to receive power.' Angel host. Heaven's millions exalt the Lamb.
Every creature says, 'Blessing, and honour... be unto him that sitteth upon the throne, and unto the Lamb.' Universal praise. All creation worships God and the Lamb.
Every creature says, 'Blessing, and honour... be unto him that sitteth upon the throne, and unto the Lamb.' Universal praise. All creation worships God and the Lamb.
